category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers entering the Colombian market.

title.en: China-to-Colombia LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入哥伦比亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入哥倫比亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Colombia's RETILAP lighting technical regulation, RETIE electrical safety regulation, RETIQ energy labelling, Certificate of Conformity issued through ONAC-accredited bodies, and NTC/IEC 60598 standards versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification. Colombia operates a 110/220 V, 60 Hz grid.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与哥伦比亚 RETILAP 照明技术法规、RETIE 电气安全法规、RETIQ 能效标签、经 ONAC 认可机构出具的合格证书及 NTC/IEC 60598 标准差距对照，与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。哥伦比亚电网为 110/220 V、60 Hz。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與哥倫比亞 RETILAP 照明技術法規、RETIE 電氣安全法規、RETIQ 能效標籤、經 ONAC 認可機構出具的合格證書及 NTC/IEC 60598 標準差距對照，與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。哥倫比亞電網為 110/220 V、60 Hz。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, accredited-body assessment, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Colombian technical regulations (RETIE, RETILAP, RETIQ), the Certificate of Conformity requirements, applicable NTC/IEC standards, ONAC-accredited body scopes, and SIC enforcement requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、认可机构评审、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行哥伦比亚技术法规（RETIE、RETILAP、RETIQ）、合格证书要求、适用的 NTC/IEC 标准、ONAC 认可机构范围及 SIC 执法要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、認可機構評審、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行哥倫比亞技術法規（RETIE、RETILAP、RETIQ）、合格證書要求、適用的 NTC/IEC 標準、ONAC 認可機構範圍及 SIC 執法要求。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer entering the Colombian market must obtain a Certificate of Conformity through an ONAC-accredited certification body demonstrating compliance with RETILAP (the mandatory lighting and public-illumination technical regulation) and RETIE (the mandatory electrical installations regulation) where applicable; test to NTC/IEC 60598 (luminaires), IEC 62560 (self-ballasted lamps), and IEC 62471 (photobiological safety) as adopted by ICONTEC; apply the RETIQ mandatory energy-efficiency label for in-scope lighting products; design for the Colombian 110/220 V, 60 Hz grid rather than China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz; obtain CRC/ANE radio approval for smart/wireless luminaires; and work through an in-country importer who registers the Certificate of Conformity and is subject to SIC market surveillance. Colombia has no horizontal RoHS, no REACH-style SVHC supply-chain regime, and no horizontal energy-using-products Ecodesign directive — energy efficiency is handled through RETIQ labelling, not minimum-efficacy market bans. None of these obligations is satisfied by an existing Chinese CCC certificate.
answer_first.zh: 进入哥伦比亚市场的中国 LED 灯具制造商须：通过 ONAC 认可的认证机构取得合格证书，证明符合 RETILAP（强制性照明及公共照明技术法规）及（适用时）RETIE（强制性电气装置法规）；按 ICONTEC 采纳的 NTC/IEC 60598（灯具）、IEC 62560（自镇流灯）及 IEC 62471（光生物安全）进行检测；对适用照明产品贴附 RETIQ 强制性能效标签；按哥伦比亚 110/220 V、60 Hz 电网而非中国 220/380 V、50 Hz 进行设计；为智能/无线灯具取得 CRC/ANE 无线电核准；并通过在地进口商办理合格证书登记，接受 SIC 市场监管。哥伦比亚无横向 RoHS、无 REACH 式 SVHC 供应链制度、亦无横向耗能产品生态设计指令——能效通过 RETIQ 标签管理，而非最低能效市场禁令。上述义务均不被现有中国 CCC 认证所满足。
answer_first.zht: 進入哥倫比亞市場的中國 LED 燈具製造商須：通過 ONAC 認可的認證機構取得合格證書，證明符合 RETILAP（強制性照明及公共照明技術法規）及（適用時）RETIE（強制性電氣裝置法規）；按 ICONTEC 採納的 NTC/IEC 60598（燈具）、IEC 62560（自鎮流燈）及 IEC 62471（光生物安全）進行檢測；對適用照明產品貼附 RETIQ 強制性能效標籤；按哥倫比亞 110/220 V、60 Hz 電網而非中國 220/380 V、50 Hz 進行設計；為智能/無線燈具取得 CRC/ANE 無線電核准；並通過在地進口商辦理合格證書登記，接受 SIC 市場監管。哥倫比亞無橫向 RoHS、無 REACH 式 SVHC 供應鏈制度、亦無橫向耗能產品生態設計指令——能效通過 RETIQ 標籤管理，而非最低能效市場禁令。上述義務均不被現有中國 CCC 認證所滿足。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Re-verify RETILAP/RETIE/RETIQ regulation versions, the Certificate of Conformity scheme, and adopted NTC/IEC standard editions on each review cycle.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. RETIQ energy-label scope and RETILAP/RETIE current resolutions must be re-checked against the Ministerio de Minas y Energia and SIC sources each cycle.
